title: Squirrel Removal White Plains, NY | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in White Plains, Westchester. Humane trapping, exclusion & attic cleanup. Licensed experts. Call now for fast service!
intro: White Plains homeowners and businesses face frequent squirrel intrusions, especially as urban development encroaches on natural habitats throughout Westchester County. Our professional squirrel removal services protect your property from the damage these persistent rodents cause to attics, soffits, and electrical wiring. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive, humane squirrel removal tailored to White Plains' unique residential and commercial properties.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of wildlife control experience to White Plains, combining humane removal techniques with permanent exclusion solutions. Our licensed technicians understand Westchester's specific squirrel behavior patterns and deliver guaranteed results with same-day emergency service available throughout the White Plains area.
localContext: White Plains' mature tree-lined neighborhoods near Bronx River Parkway and the mix of historic homes and modern high-rises downtown create ideal conditions for squirrel populations. From the estates near Saxon Woods Park to apartment complexes along Mamaroneck Avenue, we've protected countless White Plains properties from squirrel damage and re-infestation.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in White Plains?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in White Plains typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of attic damage. This includes humane trapping, complete exclusion work, and cleanup services. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates for all White Plains properties.

faqs.question: What are signs of squirrels in my White Plains attic?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scampering noises in the morning and evening, visible entry holes near rooflines or soffits, droppings in the attic, chewed wires or wood, and squirrels running along power lines to your roof. White Plains' older homes are particularly vulnerable to squirrel entry through deteriorated fascia boards and roof vents.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal in White Plains humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane, live-catch trapping methods that comply with New York State wildlife regulations. Squirrels are safely relocated according to Westchester County guidelines. We never use poison or lethal traps, and we ensure all removal practices meet local White Plains ordinances and ethical wildlife control standards.

faqs.question: How do you prevent squirrels from returning to my White Plains property?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive exclusion process seals all entry points with heavy-duty materials squirrels cannot chew through, including metal screening and reinforced barriers. We install one-way doors to allow trapped squirrels to exit, trim overhanging branches, and secure vulnerable areas like roof vents and chimneys. All exclusion work comes with a warranty against re-entry.
